name: sentiment-analysis-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Analyse text sentiment, detect emotions, and compare tones. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: analyze_sentiment
tools.description: Analyse the sentiment of a text. Returns score (0-1), label (positive/negative/neutral/mixed), and confidence.

tools.name: batch_analyze
tools.description: Analyse sentiment for multiple texts at once. Provide texts separated by '|||' delimiter.

tools.name: compare_sentiments
tools.description: Compare the sentiment of two texts side by side.

tools.name: extract_emotions
tools.description: Detect emotions present in text. Returns detected emotions with intensity scores.
